name: Hwang Chang General Contractor Co., Ltd
summary: Hwang Chang General Contractor Co., Ltd engages in construction activities in Taiwan. It undertakes the construction of public work and government contract turnkey, pumping station, baseball stadium, avenue, boulevard, road, highway, sewage treatment plant, underground station, expressway, sub-mountain diversion, and pipeline projects. The company was founded in 1981 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.
